tasks.description: The predecessor task is complete. handoff.json and result.json exist under outputs/handoff-exp/F_full_context/run01/TASK-001/. This task is only the handoff source. HALF must inject both files verbatim using the F_full_context arm.

Use the F_full_context predecessor context to implement src/inventory/api.py::search_items in https://github.com/beautyarbutin/handoff-fixture-inventory.git. Checkout handoff-exp/F_full_context/run01 created from ac64e8c; do not modify main. Reuse inventory.catalog.filter_items, support category, min_price, max_price and in_stock, ignore unknown keys, raise ValueError for invalid price values, return plain dictionaries, and run python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests. Push code to the target branch and write TASK-002 outputs under outputs/handoff-exp/F_full_context/run01/.
